name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-iotvideoindustry

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-iotvideoindustry
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Iotvideoindustry SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Iotvideoindustry SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-iotvideoindustry
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common iotvideoindustry
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.iotvideoindustry.v20201201.iotvideoindustry_client.IotvideoindustryClient.DescribeChannelLiveStreamURL
documentation:
本接口(DescribeChannelLiveStreamURL)用于获取设备指定通道实时流地址，地址是动态生成，如重新播放需要调用此接口重新获取最新播放地址。
正常推流，如未设置对应录制计划，且180s无人观看此流，将会被自动掐断。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeChannelLiveStreamURL.

type request



rtype

```

methods.name: tencentcloud.iotvideoindustry.v20201201.iotvideoindustry_client.IotvideoindustryClient.DescribeChannelLocalRecordURL
documentation:
本接口（DescribeChannelLocalRecordURL）用于将NVR等设备对应通道本地回放文件，通过GB28181信令推送至云端，并生成对应的实时视频流URL，流地址URL是动态生成，如需重新播放请重新调用此接口获取最新地址。
正常推流，如未设置对应录制计划，且180s无人观看此流，将会被自动掐断。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeChannelLocalRecordURL.

type request



rtype

```

> 统计项。取值范围：
